use anyhow::Result;

fn handle_api_error(result: Result<Response>) -> String {
    match result {
        Ok(resp) => format!("ok: {}", resp.body),
        Err(e) => {
            let msg = e.to_string();
            if msg.contains("timeout") {
                "retry later".to_string()
            } else if msg.contains("permission") || msg.contains("denied") {
                "unauthorized".to_string()
            } else if msg.contains("not found") {
                "missing resource".to_string()
            } else {
                "internal error".to_string()
            }
        }
    }
}

fn classify_error(e: &anyhow::Error) -> ErrorCode {
    let s = format!("{e}");
    if s.starts_with("ECONNREFUSED") || s.contains("connection refused") {
        ErrorCode::Unavailable
    } else if s.contains("429") || s.contains("rate limit") {
        ErrorCode::RateLimited
    } else {
        ErrorCode::Unknown
    }
}

struct Response {
    body: String,
}

enum ErrorCode {
    Unavailable,
    RateLimited,
    Unknown,
}
